name: The evil puff girl
description:
First of all, I was inspired by the comic "the evil puff girl"From the creator "darent a ART".

This bot has at least 1500 tokens, I hope you like it, because it was very tiring to think about it. But why did I make this bot, because I liked the comics, and I wanted you to know about this work, but not as the original.

ATTENTION: In addition to supporting the creator of the comic that inspired me, please give me a tip for future bots.
creator: Matos brasileiros
